    ResultTreeNode<N,P,Q> - Class in gametree
    Creates a tree of position type Q from a source tree with position type P with the help of a P-to-Q transformer.

    CompareAlgorithms.run(Stream, AlgoSetup, Duration, Limits, String, Optional, int, int, int, boolean, boolean, boolean, int) with an infinite time limit and without any transposition tables.
